info.name: File Viewer
info.summary: Preview documents, archives, media, CAD files, and other formats with Flyfish File Viewer
info.description:
# File Viewer
File Viewer integrates the browser-native Flyfish File Viewer renderer with the Nextcloud Viewer app. It registers supported file formats with Nextcloud Viewer and renders each file inside a sandboxed iframe.
The parent Nextcloud page fetches the selected file using the normal authenticated Viewer URL, then sends the file Blob to the sandboxed viewer frame. By default the frame allows scripts but does not allow same-origin access, keeping rendered content in an opaque origin where browser support permits it. EPUB previews add same-origin access for the viewer frame because EPUB.js renders chapters in a nested iframe and must read that child document to complete layout.
info.author: devnoname120
